title: Basic JavaScript Performance Optimization
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Performance Optimization. Focus on implementing Performance profiling tools correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Performance Optimization
description: Create a function that uses Performance profiling tools and Critical rendering path together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Performance Optimization Project
description: Build a small application that applies Performance profiling tools, Critical rendering path, Debouncing and throttling in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Performance Optimization
description: The following code has bugs related to Performance profiling tools. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Performance Optimization
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Performance profiling tools and Critical rendering path.
